headline: Is It Too Late To Consider AutoZone (AZO) After Mixed Returns And Premium P/E Ratio?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether AutoZone's share price of around US$3,594.08 still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the current price. The stock's returns are mixed: 0.5% over 7 days, 5.7% over 30 days and 8.8% year to date, alongside a 4.3% decline over the last year, gains of 33.5% over 3 years and 138.5% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on AutoZone's position in the auto parts retail sector and how investor sentiment has shifted between short...
